text:

From-To: open->closed


first: port has some problmes. 

===>   Deinstalling shisen.app-current-1.2.1 
pkg_delete: cannot delete specified file '/usr/local/GNUstep/System/Applications/GShisen.app' - it is a directory! 
this packing list is incorrect - ignoring delete request 
pkg_delete: cannot delete specified file '/usr/local/GNUstep/System/Applications/GShisen.app/Resources' - it is a directory! 
this packing list is incorrect - ignoring delete request 
rmdir: /usr/X11R6/lib/X11: Directory not empty 
rmdir: /usr/X11R6/lib: Directory not empty 
rmdir: /usr/X11R6/man: Directory not empty 
rmdir: /usr/X11R6/share: Directory not empty 

second: 
this ist identical to games/gshisen 

I will update games/gshisen to match parts of your port.
